programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Supercharged
programme.desc: Explores the FIA's Formula E, the world's first all-electric motor racing series.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey, Bunny and the gang are excited after they receive an invitation to a Halloween party. However, confusion ensues after the party receives a strange visitor.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and Popat persuade Zordaar to visit the vibrant carnival for amusement. Since they lack sufficient currency for purchases, the trio chooses to participate in a contest to obtain funds.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Kitty encounters a problem when her water hose suddenly stops working. As a result, she seeks help in order to repair it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi and Misae take Shin-chan and Himawari on a trip to Kumamoto in the company of Koyama who appears to be lacking in excitement.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan takes Shiro for a walk after playing with him. However, Shiro later eats the entirety of the meat Shin-chan's family had put aside for dinner.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As Misae is about to go out, Shin-chan decides on a code for him and her. Later, when a courier arrives, Shin-chan pesters him and makes him use the code.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training, he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits Keiko-san at the hospital with Misae and raises a nuisance for the nurse. Consequently, Misae scolds him for his mischief.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to buy taiyaki for his mother Misae, Shin-chan visits a store. However, he proceeds to cause a nuisance and annoy the storekeeper.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a soccer match, Kawamura faces Shin-chan and his friends. However, he underestimates their skills and ends up losing to them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan annoys a pedestrian whilst Hiroshi and Misae are preparing for a journey. Afterwards, Shin-chan dreams of dessert in their car.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Masao hears his doorbell, he rushes to answer it and enquires about the visitor. However, Shin-chan frightens him from behind.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Jack has to pay a major debt, so he brings a attache of green-backs to Oggy's house and hides it under the rug without telling Oggy about it.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a complacent cat, finds his tranquil life of leisure disrupted by mischievous cockroaches who relentlessly raid his refrigerator and create pandemonium throughout his home.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: After Oggy manages to get rid of the cockroaches, he finds himself in peaceful and serene surroundings, but he starts to feel dull a few moments later.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his friends discuss the stories of Action Mask in the park. Afterwards, they decide to role-play as characters from Action Mask's plot but Nene-chan arrives wanting to play house.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan pays a visit to Hitoshi and they play with each other. However, they end up using permanent ink to doodle on each other's faces.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: The kindergarten organises a three day trip to an island summer school for the students. Once they arrive, the principal takes them for a swim.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae wishes to knit a new sweater for Hiroshi and takes one of his old ones apart. However, with the wool, she ends up knitting a sweater for Shiro.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans out a diet she can follow to lose weight. However, her cravings get the better of her and she ends up overeating.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan demands that his mother blow balloons and play with him and does not give her any reprieve, Misae obliges.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae suffers from a backache, she visits a doctor for a diagnosis and Shin-chan accompanies her. However, Shin-chan annoys the doctor.

programme.title: TeleShopping
programme.desc: The host presents a collection of varied items for the audience, showcasing exclusive products with unique features and enticing deals.

programme.title: Baal Veer

programme.desc: The killer comes to Sushilwadi and sells off some jewellery. The shopkeeper reveals that he comes there every month to sell jewellery and reveals about his wound that lead.

programme.title: Kaun Banega Crorepati
programme.desc: Host Amitabh Bachchan receives a warm welcome and greetings from the crowd. Later, Utkarsh Bakshi from Surat joins him on the hot seat.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends come home and have to hide from their parents that their teachers have confiscated their phones.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is excited to be able to spend his Sunday with his family, enjoying Kothimbir Vadi. He eventually becomes upset when his excitement is ruined unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Eager to get some Amchur powder, Goli heads to Abdul's shop only to find that it is still closed. Tapu and friends inform the members of the society that Abdul still has not shown up.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the water stops in the middle of his shower, Popatlal gets angry and blames Bhide for what happened.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham becomes worried when they have no news of Abdul. They organise a search of his house and all the locations he usually visits.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Upon seeing debt collectors, everyone realises Abdul owes money and believes that he has been intentionally staying out of sight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is counting on Inspector Pandey to find Abdul and bring him back. However, he returns empty-handed, with Abdul still missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Although the residents are relieved by Abdul's return, he chooses to hide his financial struggles and decides to sell his shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide requests Abdul to look after Sakharam during his work hours. A stranger sets his eyes on the scooter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in the society find out that Bhide's scooter is stolen by someone and tries to go after him. However, it turns out that he is not actually a thief.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi calls Jethalal tries to convince him to talk to Bhide but the latter refuses to do so. Bhide asks Jethalal for money.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide gives the cheque to Sonu on Madhavi's guaranti. Sonu and Tapu Sena leaves for the bank. However, Bhide stops them from the balcony.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Someone withdraws cash from Bhide's cheque and Tapu Sena goes back to Gokuldham with a disappointed face.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena becomes anxious to know that they lose the cheque. However, Abdul brings his cheque from a stranger.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi receives a phone call from Goli and wonders why he needs a big sum of money as he does not believe about the education purpose.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena learns that there is a shop near their college which can offer them some loan. Pinku suggests that they must do anything as soon as possible.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu, Sonu, and Gogi reach Bhide's house and he asks them about the money. Meanwhile, Madhavi presses if Tapu Sena have encountered a problem, but they avoid the question.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul follows Tapu Sena to the loan office and gets a call from Bhide who wonders where the kids go. Bhide becomes tensed when meeting with the Hathis.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul asks Bhide if he should stop Tapu Sena but Dr Hathi thinks that it might not be a good idea. Bhide blames himself about what happened.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is relieved after learning that Tapu and his friends did not take a loan for a laptop. Jethalal tries to find out how Bhide got the money.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide steps in to cover Abdul's shift at the shop, taking on the task of preparing soda for the customers. His day takes an unsettling turn when he soon experiences a terrifying nightmare.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bapuji scolds Jethalal harshly after getting hurt in an accident. Bhide tries to make peace between them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka approach Jethalal to sign a document. Jethalal's attention is diverted when Babita arrives at the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal apologises to Bhide for the delayed cheque. Bhide considers resigning from his responsibilities.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Before the clock strikes midnight, Jethalal decides to hand over the cheque to Bhide. However, Bhide refuses to accept it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal asserts that Jethalal has submitted the maintenance cheque. However, Popatlal claims otherwise, leaving Champaklal furious.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu spends his holiday playing cricket in Gokuldham, which leads to property damage that causes everyone frustration.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: King Himavan rejoices as celestial beings bless his newborn daughter Parvati. Meanwhile, the demon Tarakasur schemes to thwart her destiny of uniting with Lord Shiva and becoming Shakti.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Tarakasur infiltrates King Himavan's palace disguised as a Shiva devotee, seeking to eliminate Parvati. Later, he wields his powers to seize control of multiple Loks.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: In her pursuit of a view of Kailash, Parvati climbs a mountain. Later, as she reaches out to adorn the Shivling with a garland, her sister Ganga intervenes.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa begins Shanaya's community work, making her take on tasks she has never done before. Later, the car that was involved in Prarthana's death arrives at Bapodara Chawl.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: In her pursuit of a view of Kailash, Parvati climbs a mountain. Later, as she reaches out to adorn the Shivling with a garland, her sister Ganga intervenes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu accidentally spills colour on Bhide, prompting Bhide to gather everyone in the society compound. Later, Tapu comes up with a plan to promote the rhymes and poems they've created for kids.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: DSP Anubhav asks Haseena to keep pretending that they are in love with each other. However, things take an unexpected turn when Karishma overhears their conversation.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma becomes furious when Haseena refuses to take her along for the mission. Later, DSP Anubhav reveals the truth behind Haseena's intentions.

programme.desc: In her pursuit of a view of Kailash, Parvati climbs a mountain. Later, as she reaches out to adorn the Shivling with a garland, her sister Ganga intervenes.

programme.desc: Jethalal seeks Tapu's help to change Champaklal's decision to adopt Pinku.

programme.desc: Although the society members are waiting for Pinku's parents, they do not show up on time. So, Champaklal and others leave for the court for Pinku's adoption.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is eager to play Holi with Babita. Meanwhile, Iyer informs Babita that he has been selected to attend an internati.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Determined to rouse Mahadev from his deep meditation, Parvati decides to seek him out. Later, she and her family set out on a quest to Kailash to find him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide arrives home elated after purchasing a golden ornament set for Sonu. Subsequently, the family ventures to the jeweller's establishment.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Sanjay's mother discovers him unresponsive in his room. Later, she erases video evidence, complicating Anvita's legal strategy.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Satark
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show - Masti Lagataar
programme.desc: Host Kapil Sharma invites celebrity guests, who discuss their latest movie projects, while keeping the audience laughing with his humourous take on several topics.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: The ultimate singing show is back, join judges Shreya Ghoshal, Vishal Dadlani & Badshah for a new season packed with amazing voices, thrilling moments, and pure entertainment!

programme.title: Crime Patrol - 26 Jurm, 26 Cases
programme.desc: The police investigate multiple fatalities that have taken place at a hotel, decoding oddities and working through bizarre occurrences.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Dial 100
programme.desc: A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol Dial 100', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A child molester is on the run, preying on innocent victims every Thursday. Will the Police track him down and nab him down?

programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The children at Dwarka Mai request Sai to teach them something new. On the other hand, Sai's intervention causes Chandorkar's path to cross with Kaka.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai performs a miracle and saves Gayatri from getting injured. In the meantime, Kaka rushes to the room to check on his daughter.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Kaka sees Sai holding the trunk but, nobody believes his words. On the other hand, Kulkarni vows to not let Sai get the land at any cost.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: A differently-abled man approaches Sai and asks him to heal his disability. However, Sai asks him to cleanse his mind before Sai helps him heal his body.
